channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Suspected Killers of Angwan Rukuba Attack Arraigned in Plateau State Court
item.description: Four suspects linked to the deadly Angwan Rukuba killings in Plateau State were arraigned before the Plateau High Court on Thursday, April 23, 2026, under tight security. The suspects were arrested by...

item.title: Steering Committee advances preparations for AFCON 2027 in East Africa
item.description: The Main Steering Committee for AFCON 2027 has convened in Kampala, Uganda to push forward preparations for the continental football tournament, which will be hosted jointly by Tanzania, Kenya, and Ug...

item.title: Sara Duterte Faces Impeachment Over Alleged Wealth and Fund Misuse
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte is currently facing impeachment proceedings over accusations of misusing public funds and unexplained wealth. Various constitutional provisions and laws are cited in the di...

item.title: Cast of “Blood vs Duty” Shares Thoughts on Their Roles
item.description: The lead actors of the popular TV series “Blood vs Duty” recently opened up about their experiences portraying their respective characters. Richard Gutierrez, Gerald Anderson, Bela Padilla, Baron Geis...

item.title: KCMC's Sh3 Billion Heart Centre to Transform Cardiac Care in Tanzania
item.description: The Kilimanjaro Christian Medical Centre (KCMC) is making significant strides towards improving heart care in Tanzania with the launch of a Sh3 billion cardiac centre, aimed at providing accessible, l...

item.title: House committee continues impeachment hearings on VP Sara Duterte amid financial scrutiny and AMLC findings
item.description: The House Committee on Justice in the Philippines continued its impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte during its April 22 hearing, focusing heavily on allegations of unexplained ...

item.title: Key Developments Leading to Duterte’s ICC Trial Over Drug War Killings
item.description: Rodrigo Duterte is set to face trial at the International Criminal Court (ICC) over alleged crimes against humanity linked to his war on drugs in the Philippines. The ICC pre-trial chamber confirmed a...

item.title: Simba face JKU as Singida meet Mlandege in Union Cup quarterfinals in Zanzibar
item.description: Simba SC and Singida Black Stars have kicked off their Union Cup journey in Zanzibar with high expectations as both teams aim to progress to the semifinals. Simba are facing JKU SC in a much-anticipat...

item.title: Israel faces allegations of war crime over killing of Lebanese journalist
item.description: A report from Agence France-Presse highlights accusations against Israel following the killing of a Lebanese journalist, an incident that has sparked international concern and renewed scrutiny over th...

item.title: Delays in Permit Allocation Leave Johannesburg Informal Traders Struggling
item.description: Since October 2025, informal traders in Johannesburg's city centre have faced severe disruptions after the municipality removed hundreds of them for alleged non-compliance with trading bylaws. Many tr...

item.title: Karangu Muraya Introduces His Family at Brother's Burial, Talks About Having More Children
item.description: Kikuyu musician and influencer Karangu Muraya recently buried his brother, Paul Karangu, in Murang'a County. During the emotional ceremony, Karangu took a moment to introduce his second wife, Carol Ki...

item.title: Renewed push from ANC structures positions Tokyo Sexwale as a possible 2027 leadership contender
item.description: Tokyo Sexwale has re-emerged as a potential contender in the African National Congress (ANC) leadership race ahead of its 2027 elective conference, with backing reportedly coming from structures in Kw...

item.title: Freeport-McMoRan Cuts Grasberg Mine Forecast, Shares Decline
item.description: Freeport-McMoRan Inc., a leading copper producer, announced a significant downward revision to its production forecast for the Grasberg mine in Indonesia, overshadowing otherwise strong first-quarter ...

item.title: Kenyan Nurse Sharon Mwiti Helps Family After Securing Job Abroad
item.description: A young Kenyan nurse from Meru, Sharon Mwiti, has shared her inspiring journey of working abroad and giving back to her family. While still in nursing school, Sharon applied for over 50 jobs before fi...

item.title: One Year After Vancouver Lapu Lapu Festival Attack, Survivors and Families Struggle to Heal
item.description: One year after the tragic car-ramming attack at Vancouver’s Lapu Lapu festival, survivors and families continue to cope with immense physical, emotional, and financial challenges. Eleven people were k...

item.title: New Mamire Gate at Tarangire National Park Improves Visitor Access and Local Opportunities
item.description: Tanzania National Parks Authority (Tanapa) has officially opened a new entrance at Tarangire National Park, called the Mamire Gate, aiming to enhance access for tourists and stimulate local economic a...

item.title: Philippine Air Force Launches New Basing Support Facilities on Pag-asa Island
item.description: The Philippine Air Force (PAF) has officially inaugurated the Basing Support System on Pag-asa Island in Palawan, a move aimed at strengthening its operational capabilities in the West Philippine Sea....

item.title: Three Men Convicted of Rape on Brighton Beach
item.description: Three men have been found guilty of the brutal and callous rape of a woman on Brighton Beach. The crime occurred in broad daylight, where the victim was subjected to a horrific attack by the men, who ...

item.title: AI Detection Tool Suggests Widespread Use of Generated Content Online, Including High-Profile Accounts
item.description: A new Chrome extension from Pangram Labs aims to identify AI-generated content across popular online platforms in real time, labeling text as human-written, AI-generated, or AI-assisted. The tool, whi...

item.title: Arrest made in case of IRS officer’s daughter raped and murdered in Delhi; suspect linked to prior crime in Alwar
item.description: In a disturbing case that unfolded over just 48 hours, police have arrested Rahul Meena, a 23-year-old former domestic employee, in connection with the rape and murder of a 22-year-old IIT graduate in...
